data.body: Additional context from host session: Skills may not have been loaded at the time of the failed invocation. After running /reload-plugins, the system reported: 'Reloaded: 1 plugin, 3 skills, 29 agents, 14 hooks, 0 plugin MCP servers, 0 plugin LSP servers'. This suggests the skill content was absent or stale before the reload, which would cause the skill to appear minimal (just re-invoking itself). Investigate whether skill loading state correlates with the non-autonomous behavior — the bug may be a plugin load failure rather than purely an LLM behavioral issue.
